text.title: Opportunity Solution Trees Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is exactly one metric-based outcome at the root?

conclusion.verdict: pin exactly one outcome before any opportunity work
rewire orphans under opportunities or remove
emit kill list + prune dead branches

example.trace: outcome=pinned -> orphans=no -> monthly=due -> kill list emitted (2 entries).

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
